lwpdkadgS A** ¹iQk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@456@08&09@lhvks@thlh&nkSlk(vkxjk&Hkjriqj)chvksVhº vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd July, 2013 S.O. 2227(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highway Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways (Collection of Fees by any person for the Use of Section of National Highways/Permanent Bridge/temporary Bridge on National Highway) Rules, 1997, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road, Transport and Highways number S.O. 1515(E), dated 18th June, 2009, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely :— In the said notification for paragraph 3 (ii) of Notes, the existing paragraph shall be substituted namely:- ‘‘3. (ii) WPI - B is the Average Wholesale Price Index for the year ending 31st March preceding the fee revision date’’. [F. No. NHAI/13013/456/08-09/CO/GC-Dausa (Agra- Bharatpur) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt.
